notes: Pronunciation fixes applied via phonetic respelling in tts_text only; display_text (on-screen/article copy) is unchanged. Rate varies per step to keep TTS audio within each step's visual window. Shelley (English (US)) chosen over Samantha for upbeat/energetic tone.

steps.display_text: A Categorise slide turns sorting into a live quiz.
steps.tts_text: A cat-a-guh-rize slide turns sorting into a lyve quiz.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Categorise from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select cat-a-guh-rize from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Type your sorting challenge in the question field.
steps.tts_text: Type your sorting challenge in the question field.

steps.display_text: Enter the items participants will sort, separated by commas.
steps.tts_text: Enter the items participants will sort, separated by commas.

steps.display_text: Give your first category a name — this is the bucket they'll sort items into.
steps.tts_text: Give your first category a name — this is the bucket they'll sort items into.

steps.display_text: Click Add Category to create as many buckets as you need.
steps.tts_text: Click Add Category to create as many buckets as you need.

steps.display_text: Your slide is ready. Hit Present to go live with your audience.
steps.tts_text: Your slide is ready. Hit Present to go lyve with your audience.

mix_command: ffmpeg -i trimmed-visual.webm -i s01.aiff -i s02.aiff -i s03.aiff -i s04.aiff -i s05.aiff -i s06.aiff -i s07.aiff -i s08.aiff -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=3000|3000[a2];[3:a]adelay=9800|9800[a3];[4:a]adelay=13800|13800[a4];[5:a]adelay=20800|20800[a5];[6:a]adelay=26800|26800[a6];[7:a]adelay=31800|31800[a7];[8:a]adelay=36200|36200[a8];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8]amix=inputs=8:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k narrated.webm
